name: Mexican Layered Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon refried beans onto the bottom of a large serving dish.
2. Arrange tortilla chips on top of the beans in an even layer.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the chips.
4. Add black beans and diced tomatoes on top of the cheese.
5. Scatter fresh cilantro leaves over the beans.
6. Finish with lime wedges for serving.
